hero.tagline: Made For India. Born From Europe.

overview.minides: Skoda's MQB-A0-IN compact SUV — refreshed with connected LED lighting, illuminated Skoda wordmark, panoramic sunroof, 10.25-inch digital cockpit, rear seat massager, and 8-speed automatic for the 1.0 TSI — all on a 5-star Global NCAP platform.
overview.description: The Skoda Kushaq facelift (2026) is Skoda's made-in-India compact SUV, now updated with sharper connected LED headlamps and tail lamps, an illuminated Skoda wordmark at the rear, a new dual-tone beige-black interior, a 10.25-inch digital cockpit, a 10.07-inch touchscreen, and alloy wheels as standard across all variants. It continues to offer two engine options: a 1.0-litre three-cylinder TSI producing 115 PS and 178 Nm (now paired with a new 8-speed torque converter automatic alongside the 6-speed manual), and a 1.5-litre four-cylinder TSI ACT with 150 PS and 250 Nm, available only with a 7-speed DSG. Key segment-first additions include a rear seat massager (Prestige and Monte Carlo), a panoramic sunroof on top trims, an electric sunroof as standard, and disc brakes on all four wheels on 1.5 TSI variants. The Kushaq carries a 5-star Global NCAP rating but does not offer ADAS on any variant — a notable omission. The Monte Carlo trim adds all-black exterior accents, 17-inch 'Athens' alloy wheels, and a black-red interior theme.
